Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of deputy sheriff for the Tompkins county sheriff's office
Summary: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of deputy sheriff for the Tompkins county sheriff's office.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to allowing Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of deputy sheriff for the Tompkins county sheriff's office
